calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Mike Colgan, Esq. for and with Plaintiff David X. Martin
No appearance by the Defendants: Trophy Properties Marina, LLC; Citiapartments, Inc.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Damages $18,110.00
Interest $1,920.16
Costs $420.00
Punitive Damages $3,220.00
Total $23,670.16
Counsel shall prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 by the 25th of Feb. for signature.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2009 Set For Trial On Feb-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
